name: @estebanforge/pi-js-review
description_en: JavaScript code-review tool for Pi. Grades your git diffs against a focused JS flaws rubric (5 sections, 18 entries: equality/coercion, async, mutation/scope, globals/prototypes, security). Each entry has a bad/good pair; the LLM proposes a corrected snip
description_zh: Pi 的 JavaScript 代码审查工具。根据专注的 JS 缺陷评分标准（5 个部分，18 个条目：相等性/强制转换、异步、突变/作用域、全局变量/原型、安全）对你的 git 差异进行评分。每个条目都有坏/好对；LLM 提出修正代码片段
